name: Grilled Cheese and Bacon Sandwich
directions: butter both sides of the bread.
Place on cheese slice and 2 bacon slices in between 2 slices of bread.
Toast on both sides until golden brown and cheese is melted.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich

name: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich
directions: Spray both sides of each bread with cooking spray.  Then place in toaster, toasted to your desire.  Then place cheese slices between the toast and microwave for 15 seconds. Serve and eat!

name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce
directions: In a shallow bowl,beat eggs and milk. In another bowl,combine the bread crumbs,Parmesan cheese and parsley,  Dip ham cubes in egg mixture, then roll in crumb mixture.
In an electric skillet, heat 1/4 inch of oil to 375. Fry ham cubes, a few at a time, for 2 minutes on each side or until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
In a small saucepan, heat cheese and milk over medium heat for 3-4 minutes or until cheese is melted.  Remove from the heat; stir in salsa.  Serve with ham cubes.

name: Baked Ham and Cheese Sandwiches
directions: Melt butter and add mustard (cheap, yellow), onion and poppy seeds.  Cook slowly until onion is tender.
Spread both sides of your choice of sandwich roll with the above mixture.
Add slices of ham and cheese. Pile it on!
Wrap sandwiches in foil and bake in 375 degree oven for 15-20 minutes.

similar.name: Baked Ham and Swiss Sandwiches With Dijon Spread
Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Pork Sandwich
directions: Spread both bread slices with mayonnaise.
Spread pickle relish over the mayonnaise on both slices of bread.
On bottom slice, lay pork slices, then onion slices on top of pork.
Squirt optional Sriracha chili paste over the pork.
Place top slice of sandwich over the pork.
Carefully cut sandwich in half with very sharp knife, being careful not to pull the sandwich apart as you cut through the pork.
To do this press down gently with hand on sandwich as you gently cut straight down without too much sawing motion through the pork.
Pork will tend to resist cutting but just take it slow and it will go through.
Once it is halved, serve on plate with your favorite accompaniments, such as potato chips and soft drink.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Beef Jerky
directions: Trim any fat from meat. Chill meat in freezer about an hour. Slice across the grain about 1/4 inch thick. Mix marinade ingredients together in large, non-reactive bowl. Add meat and stir to coat. Refrigerate for 12 hours, stirring occasionally.

Set dehydrator at 125 degrees F. Drain beef and place in single layer on dryer trays. Takes from 8 to 10 hours. In some dehydrators, the shelves should be rotated every few hours. If any fat accumulates on surface of meat, wipe off with paper towels. Jerky should be dry but flexible when bent.
Cool thoroughly and store in airtight containers (I store it in the refrigerator.).

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Baked Ham and Swiss Sandwiches With Dijon Spread
directions: Melt margarine and add mustard, poppy seed, and onion flakes.
Spread on top half of sliced buns.
Layer meat and cheese on bottom half of buns and complete the sandwich.
Cover with foil and and warm in oven, on low, until cheese is melted.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Grilled Triple Cheese
directions: Spread ½ teaspoon butter on 1 side of each bread slice; place bread, butter side down, on a working surface.
Place 2 slices cheddar cheese, 2 slices mozzarella cheese, and 2 slices swiss cheese on 1 slice of bread.
Close the sandwich by placing slice of bread, butter side out, on top; repeat for remaining sandwiches.
Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a saute pan on medium heat; place sandwich on the heat for about 2 minutes.
Using a spatula, flip the sandwich and heat for about 2 minutes.
Flip again for about 1 minute on each side to be sure that all the cheese is melted.
Repeat with remaining sandwiches, adding more butter to the pan as needed.

similar.name: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich

name: Hot Sandwich
directions: In bowl mix all ingredients together.
Add enough salad Dressing (mayo or Miracle Whip) to hold ingredients together.
Add salt and pepper to taste.
Place on buns, cover with foil.
Bake 350°F for about 15-20 minutes until cheese melts.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Paula Deen's Chicken Salad
directions: Mix all of the ingredients together lightly.
Chill until ready for service.
Place lettuce leaves on chilled salad plates and top with chicken salad.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: 5 Cheese Grilled Cheese
directions: Spread whipped butter on sourdough bread.
Pat the butter side in the grated parmesan cheese.
Place both bread pieces (Parmesan side down) in a skillet or on a griddle.
Put 1 slice of swiss and provolone on 1 slice of bread and 1 slice of mozzarella and cheddar on the other.
Cook until parmesan it toasted.
Place sandwich slices together and enjoy!

name: Easy Chicken Salad
directions: Simply mix canned chicken, mayo and real bacon bits to taste and serve on crackers.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Chicken Express
directions: Skin and debone breasts. Dip into melted butter; coat with mixture of 1/2 crumbs and 1/2 cheese. Brush pieces of aluminum foil big enough to cover the chicken with melted butter. Press the ends together. Place pkg. of chicken on baking sheet and bake at 450 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes. To serve, remove carefully from foil wrappers and garnish with fresh parsley.

name: Buffalo Chicken Dip
directions: 1.  Before you begin make sure the cream cheese is softened.
2.  Take the chicken out of the can and shred with your hands.
3.  Mix all ingredients in a bowl and place in a baking dish.  Bake at 350 for  20-30 minutes.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Avocado Chicken Salad
directions: Shred cooked chicken breast.
mix in avocado, onion,lime juice,and cilantro.
Use to top a green salad.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Chicken Salad
directions: Using a stand mixer with paddle attachment, blend chicken breasts until thoroughly shredded, or shred by hand (or you can just chop the chicken).
Remove bowl from the stand mixer and add in all other ingredients. Stir by hand to mix well.
Serve over lettuce leaves or in sandwiches.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce

name: Classic Grilled Two Cheeses
directions: Brush one side of each slice of bread with butter.
Top bread with cheeses. Cover with bread slices.  Place on panini grill and cook 3-4 minutes or until golden.

similar.name: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich

name: Michael Drive Chicken
directions: Combine all spices into a bowl.
Season the chicken on one side.
Place chicken on grill seasoned side down.
When its time to turn, season other side of chicken and then turn over on grill.
After about 5 minute on each side take chicken off grill and brush with barbecue sauce.
Add to buns with condiments or eat grilled with your favorite side. Either way, enjoy!

name: Easy Grilled Cheese
directions: Turn Toaster Sideways.
Put cheese on each piece of bread.
Slide the Bread (with the cheese) into the toaster.
Push down toaster.
Wait for it to finish and smoosh the 2 pieces of bread together! (make sure to take it out if you hear crackling).

similar.name: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich

name: Cheeze Bread
directions: Put In A Pan, Cook Until Golden Brown Both Sides.
Enjoy!
and --  With Love!

similar.name: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich

name: Mini Baked Ham (And Cheese) Sandwiches
directions: Melt butter and mix in mustard, sauce and onion.
Cut the entire pack of rolls in half, horizontally (keeping all top and bottom halves separately in tact).
In a 9x13 inch pan, place bottom half of rolls and cover with ham and cheese.
Cover ham and cheese stacks with top half of rolls.
Drizzle butter mixture over top of rolls, making sure onion is evenly distributed.
Refrigerate over night. Or bake right away.
Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes and, once finished, separate for serving.
*you can mix up the meats (roast beef or turkey) and cheeses (cheddar or american)  to create your own combinations*.

similar.name: Fried Ham Cubes & Cheese Dipping Sauce
Baked Ham and Swiss Sandwiches With Dijon Spread

name: Air Fryer Grilled Cheese
directions: Butter the outsides of the bread.
Place cheese inside and secure with a couple toothpicks (so the bread doesn't fly off inside the air fryer).
Cook 4 minutes at 370, then flip and cook another 4 minutes.

similar.name: Quick Low Fat Grilled Cheese Sandwich
